user_query: I'd like to end the first day with some live music. Add Pj O'Brien's to the end of Day 1.

fields.name: Pj O'Brien's
fields.description: Traditional Irish pub known for its cozy atmosphere and live music performances. A great spot to unwind with a drink after dinner.
highlights: Wide selection of beers and spirits

insertion_point.reasoning: The user wants to end Day 1 with live music at Pj O'Brien's. Since the last activity (Canoe Restaurant) ends at 9:00 PM, position -1 appends this new POI to the end of the day, scheduled for 9:30 PM.
